form.label: Agent Tokenomics Overview
form.description: Executive view of agent token consumption, cost pressure, and optimization opportunities from O11y / OTel GenAI telemetry.

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where connector!="(unknown)" | stats count by connector | sort - count

div.p: Track which agents, models, connectors, and sessions are driving token consumption, then pivot from cost pressure to runtime governance in Splunk and Cloud Control.

div.span: Powered by O11y / OTel GenAI telemetry
Cost proxy: tokens, not contract dollars

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | stats sum(total_tokens) as value

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | stats dc(session_id) as value

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | stats sum(tool_tokens) as value
`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_recommendations` | where waste_hint!="normal" | stats count as value

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | timechart span=15m sum(input_tokens) as input sum(output_tokens) as output sum(cached_tokens) as cached sum(reasoning_tokens) as reasoning sum(tool_tokens) as tool

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | stats sum(input_tokens) as input sum(output_tokens) as output sum(cached_tokens) as cached sum(reasoning_tokens) as reasoning sum(tool_tokens) as tool | eval scope="tokens" | untable scope token_type tokens | fields token_type tokens

panel.title: Top Agents And Connectors By Token Usage

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_rollup` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") | table agent_name connector total_tokens input_tokens output_tokens cached_tokens reasoning_tokens tool_tokens sessions runs output_input_ratio cached_ratio models targets | sort - total_tokens | head 10

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by model | sort - total_tokens | head 10

panel.title: Top Tools / Targets By Token Usage

search.query: `defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | where ("$connector$"="*" OR connector="$connector$") AND ("$agent$"="*" OR agent_name="$agent$") AND ("$model$"="*" OR model="$model$") AND target!="(none)" | stats sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens by target | sort - total_tokens | head 10

`defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_recommendations` | table session_id run_id agents connectors models total_tokens input_tokens output_tokens cached_tokens reasoning_tokens tool_tokens waste_hint recommendation first_seen last_seen | sort - total_tokens | head 15

| makeresults | eval check="Token telemetry present" | appendcols [ search `defenseclaw_demo_tokenomics_events` | stats count as observed_events sum(total_tokens) as total_tokens dc(session_id) as sessions ] | eval status=case(observed_events>0 AND total_tokens>0, "ready", observed_events>0, "events present but token totals low", 1=1, "no token events") | table check status observed_events total_tokens sessions
